summary_lines: Newcastle tender re-released.
Previously this had been released and won by Sectra in December ’24.
AGFA challenged and caused the tender to drop.
New tender requirements are significantly more extensive and stringent.
Submission on September 2nd.
Waiting decision, expected ????...
Held meeting with SWASH 15/07/2025
SWASH looking to:

ireland (digital pathology national tend.display_name: Ireland (Digital Pathology National Tender – Dell/PFH/Leica Bid)
summary_lines: National pathology solution to be deployed phased across 40+ Labs in Southern Ireland

NIMIS (National Radiology system, delivered by Change/Optum) is currently not expected to go to tender soon, despite questions about validity and legality of the extensions – they’ve been there for 15 years and the suggestion is that they should have gone to tender.
PIN released – expected to have heavy on-prem focus
Sectra secured opportunity, beating AGFA and Philips.
Covers 7 NHS Trusts (4 Sectra – Whittington, North Midds, Moorfields and GOSH; 3 Non-Sectra – UCLH, Royal Free and RNOH).
Radiology + Breast Screening only for now.
Additional Ophthalmology VNA opportunity discussions ongoing with Kevan Turnbull (EA for Moorfields)
Additional options pricing provided, waiting for further updates from NCL.
Contract expected now by end of the year.
Barts Health contract expiring next year.
Evaluating options to join NEL Sectra One Cloud ASAP – considering Hybrid Cloud options ahead of a merge.
Barts evaluating 1-year migration option with hardware in situ, plus 4.5 year contract to join NEL Sectra One Cloud.

royal marsden sectra one cloud refresh +.display_name: Royal Marsden Sectra One Cloud Refresh + VNA Deployment
summary_lines: Royal Marsden need a HW Refresh in 2026.

Currently Customer provided HW – wanting to evaluate options between doing an Customer on-premises refresh, a Customer provided cloud refresh or a Sectra One Cloud refresh for the remainder of the contract period.

north east and north cumbria digital pat.display_name: North East and North Cumbria Digital Pathology (NENC, formally NECA)
summary_lines: The region, formerly known as NECA, has gone out to tender for a new Digital Pathology solution.
Currently a Sectra DPAT site comprising the following Trusts:
County Durham and Darlington NHS Foundation Trust
Gateshead Health NHS Foundation Trust
Newcastle Upon Tyne Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
North Tees and Hartlepool NHS Foundation Trust
South Tees Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
Northumbria Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust
North Cumbria Integrated Care NHS Foundation Trust
The consortium is currently on customer-provided hardware and was mandated to retender despite being broadly satisfied with Sectra’s existing service.
This was Sectra UK’s first live DPAT site (October 2019) and was very competitively priced at the time.
A significant price increase is expected, but we have proactively aligned expectations with the customer and shared indicative business pricing earlier this year.
